Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4
In this video, Tanner is going to walk you through creating your first landing page so you can begin the process of setting up your event funnel.
Where this may have seemed complicated before, Tanner is going to show you just how simple it is with the Mindmint software!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Login to the Mindmint software. (**And keep in mind all of what you are about to do CAN be changed and adjusted at a later date!)
Go to the same event we built your agenda in.
Click "Website" at the top.
Choose a format.
Choose a color scheme.
Choose Application or Order
Click "Edit Site"
